title: The Immersive Music Mod
description: 147 new songs. Played based on biome and structure!
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/915663995594223648?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%235865F2&label=Discord%20Server&labelColor=%23000000&color=%23000000)
![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCLjGNHycv1vn3AP3z4VXg7g?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=%23FFFFFF&label=Gold%20Eagle&labelColor=%23000000&color=%23bf0000&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fchannel%2FUCLjGNHycv1vn3AP3z4VXg7g)




# The Immersive Music Mod 

This mod is the ultimate music mod. TIMM adds biome specific music, the plan is to eventually add 10-15 unique songs for each biome, as well as to also add structure and event based music in the future. There are currently over 140 brand new songs included in the current build of the mod with more being added with each update. Make sure to [join the Discord](https://discord.gg/k75WQt2RsM) to give your thoughts!

Compatible with `Terralith`, `Nature's Spirit`, `Biomes O' Plenty`, `Oh The Biomes You'll Go`, `Regions Unexplored`, `Terrestria`, `Wythers`, and `Better Nether`.


# The Music
 
The music is composed with the intention to set the scene for the player as well as to capture the spirit of each biome and structure in a style that's a mix of C418 and the newer composers!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6neRfMlUMGU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# Copyright

Feel free to use any and all of the songs in your YouTube videos, Twitch streams, and so on, as either a part of gameplay or a backing track. The copyright license is just to protect against people using the music and charging other users for it. I.E. if your audience has to pay to access your content, and you are using my music, that does infringe on the copyright. Other than that, I am more then happy to allow everyone using this mod to share the music with their audiences and friends.

# The Team

The mod was conceptualized by Nate (aka Gold Eagle) and is coded by Pardys (pardys\_ on Discord). Music featured in this mod is also composed by [Gold Eagle](https://www.youtube.com/@goldeagleproductions)

# Mod Commands

- `/skip` (Skips the current song, if no song is provided the mod will pick a new one)
- `/timmstop` or `/stp`  (Stops playing the current song and does not play a new song) 
- `/np` or `/nowplaying` (Displays the song that is currently playing)
- `/cfg` (Opens a config. menu where you can adjust things such as song delay)
